name: How do they measure how bad my work hearing loss is for comp in Utah?
description: Audiogram % binaural impairment x scheduled weeks x wage.[2]

mainEntity.name: How do they measure how bad my work hearing loss is for comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audiogram % binaural impairment x scheduled weeks x wage.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Binaural impairment percentage from audiogram, using AMA or state schedule, multiplied by weeks (e.g., 150 for total loss).[2] Tests average frequencies, account for both ears.[1] Key factors: Independent tester avoids bias, must show occupational cause, not age.[3] Schedule audiologist familiar with WC, bring exposure details.[2] Lawyer ensures fair rating.[5]
